auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your health profile.

errors.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already registered with another account.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.userDisabled: This user account has been disabled.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.wrongPassword: The password you entered is incorrect.
errors.invalidCredential: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.weakPassword: The password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.networkRequestFailed: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
errors.operationNotAllowed: This sign-in method is currently disabled.
errors.accountExistsWithDifferentCredential: An account already exists with this email but using a different sign-in method. Please sign in with your password.
errors.popupClosedByUser: The sign-in popup was closed before completing. Please try again.
errors.cancelledPopupRequest: The sign-in request was cancelled. Only one popup can be open at a time.
errors.popupBlocked: The sign-in popup was blocked by your browser. Please allow popups for this site.
